calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
Drexel Bradshaw, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Antonio Quevedo
Joseph Bravo, Esq. on behalf of defendant Tanya Castillo

The parties reached a settlement for premises located at 18-A Heyman St., San Francisco, CA. A written stipulation was signed by all parties in open court. Counsel to file stipulation. The only terms stated on the record was regarding paragraph 4 of the stipulation which is to state that defendant Castillo will make complaint to rent board regarding back rents and inhabitability, and all parties will abide by the rent board's decision. Also stated was paragraph #6 which states that after 12 months if there is non-compliance to the terms of the settlement, plaintiff to come in ex parte and have entry of judgment for restitution of premises with no further stay.

Judge Paul Alvarado, Clerks: D. Hakewill/V. Mu Reporter: Bob Balian, #5220 (206)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: HANNAH PETERS FOR PLAINTIFF ANTONIO QUEVEDO, ALSO PRESENT
BAO-QUAN PHAM FOR DEFENDANT TANYA CASTILLO, ALSO PRESENT

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JUDGE PRO TEM: TEILA CHALMERS; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
